raw_consumer_statement: I was fraudulently charged twice by a merchant on XX/XX/XXXX for {$87.00} and {$91.00}. I reported it to Citibank, and XXXX of the charges was reimbursed, but the other remained pending. In XXXX, the merchant refunded XXXX charge, but the other charge remained and posted in XXXX. I was charged interest every month since XXXX in the amounts of {$2.00}, {$2.00}, and {$2.00} despite the charges being " under investigation ''.
